title: Implement v3.9 progress, tree-position, proof, and viewer-session layer below the operator brief
description: Add a bounded runtime surface below the operator brief so operators can see change over time, trunk and branch position, supporting proof, and the viewer from one runtime path.
triage_notes: Completed and released as v3.9.0. Closed during release finalization so shipped v3.9 work no longer remains on the open runtime path.
